purpose: Starter fixtures for scope-fit checks, evidence freshness, and final completion gating.

input.scope: Add lightweight review scaffolding for uncovered prompt surfaces.
evidence_available: Direct inspection of newly added REVIEW.md files
Direct inspection of newly added eval fixtures

must_include: a scope_map tying the added review scaffolding to the requested coverage
inspection-based evidence rather than unnecessary command output
confirmation that final verification evidence is ready to record in the plan doc if plan completion depends on it
must_not: require unrelated build or test commands for docs-only changes
claim readiness without citing fresh inspection evidence

input.scope: Close the final milestone and report the whole plan complete.
evidence_available: A test run from before the last code edit
No fresh verification note ready for the final milestone entry

must_include: the smallest concrete action needed to finish verification
must_not: reuse stale evidence as proof of completion
allow plan completion without final verification evidence ready to attach
